    PSM for coral d18O¶

    In this tutorial, we introduce the PSM for coral d18O in cfr.

    In [1]:
    Copied! 
    %load_ext autoreload
%autoreload 2

import cfr
print(cfr.__version__)
    %load_ext autoreload %autoreload 2 import cfr print(cfr.__version__)

    Data preparation¶

    Proxy¶

    In [2]:
    Copied! 
    pdb = cfr.ProxyDatabase().fetch('PAGES2kv2')
    pdb = cfr.ProxyDatabase().fetch('PAGES2kv2')
    In [3]:
    Copied! 
    pobj = pdb['Ocn_062']
fig, ax = pobj.plot()
    pobj = pdb['Ocn_062'] fig, ax = pobj.plot()

    Model¶

    In [4]:
    Copied! 
    # note here the nc files have been interpolated to the atmos grid
%%time
dirpath = './data/icesm_last_millennium_historical'

model_tos = cfr.ClimateField().load_nc(os.path.join(dirpath, 'tos_sfc_Omon_iCESM_past1000historical_085001-200512_interp.nc'))
model_d18Osw = cfr.ClimateField().load_nc(os.path.join(dirpath, 'd18Osw_sfc_Omon_iCESM_past1000historical_085001-200512_interp.nc'))
    # note here the nc files have been interpolated to the atmos grid %%time dirpath = './data/icesm_last_millennium_historical' model_tos = cfr.ClimateField().load_nc(os.path.join(dirpath, 'tos_sfc_Omon_iCESM_past1000historical_085001-200512_interp.nc')) model_d18Osw = cfr.ClimateField().load_nc(os.path.join(dirpath, 'd18Osw_sfc_Omon_iCESM_past1000historical_085001-200512_interp.nc'))
    CPU times: user 1.94 s, sys: 11.3 ms, total: 1.95 s
Wall time: 2.13 s

    Get climate data for a specific ProxyRecord¶

    In [5]:
    Copied! 
    %%time

pobj.del_clim()
pobj.get_clim(model_tos, tag='model')
pobj.get_clim(model_d18Osw, tag='model')
    %%time pobj.del_clim() pobj.get_clim(model_tos, tag='model') pobj.get_clim(model_d18Osw, tag='model')
    CPU times: user 343 ms, sys: 7.56 s, total: 7.9 s
Wall time: 2min 46s

    Create a PSM object¶

    In [6]:
    Copied! 
    mdl = cfr.psm.Coral_d18O(pobj)
    mdl = cfr.psm.Coral_d18O(pobj)
    In [7]:
    Copied! 
    %%time
pp = mdl.forward()
    %%time pp = mdl.forward()
    CPU times: user 382 µs, sys: 207 µs, total: 589 µs
Wall time: 379 µs
    In [8]:
    Copied! 
    fig, ax = pp.plot()
    fig, ax = pp.plot()
